hero.title: Ace Your JavaScript Interview
hero.description: Prepare for JavaScript developer interviews with topic-wise guides, coding challenges, async patterns, and real-world scenarios used by top tech companies.

javascript core fundamentals.description: Variables, data types, operators, type conversion, and basic syntax mastery.

functions & scope.description: Function declarations, expressions, arrow functions, scope chains, and closures.

objects & prototypes.description: Object creation, prototypes, inheritance, classes, and object patterns.

arrays & collections.description: Array methods, iteration, map/filter/reduce, sets, maps, and typed arrays.

asynchronous javascript.description: Callbacks, promises, async/await, event loop, and microtask/macrotask queues.

es6+ modern features.description: Destructuring, spread/rest, template literals, modules, and new APIs.

dom manipulation & events.description: DOM traversal, event handling, event delegation, and dynamic content.

error handling & debugging.description: Try/catch, error objects, debugging techniques, and Chrome DevTools.

browser apis & storage.description: localStorage, sessionStorage, fetch API, Web Workers, and geolocation.

functional programming.description: Pure functions, immutability, composition, currying, and higher-order functions.

design patterns in js.description: Module, singleton, observer, factory, and common JavaScript patterns.

coding challenges & problems.description: Real interview questions, algorithm challenges, and problem-solving patterns.

seo.title: JavaScript Interview Preparation Guide | Frontend & Backend Developer
seo.description: Comprehensive interview preparation for JavaScript developer roles: core concepts, ES6+, async patterns, closures, prototypes, DOM manipulation, and real-world coding challenges.
